issues.title: Use Meringue to build Meringue
issues.description: Historical demo receipt: Meringue has already been used to improve its own TUI, kernel logs, harness selection, and worker delivery workflow.

issues.title: Polish parallel-agent dashboard
issues.description: Historical demo receipt: make the AgentTree, conversation pane, kernel logs, slash commands, jump mode, and PR navigation clear enough for a live demo.

issues.title: Tune zsh workflow helpers
issues.description: Historical demo receipt for recent .config work: local zsh workflow polish and terminal helper changes. Keep this high-level and safe for screen sharing; do not expose secrets, hostnames, tokens, or private machine details.

issues.title: Collect missing dotfiles
issues.description: Historical demo receipt for recent .config work: bring missing local dotfile pieces under version control and keep personal workflow helpers organized.

harness_metadata.title: Ship self-hosting workflow
harness_metadata.last_assistant_text: Meringue has already used worker agents to improve Meringue itself: better orchestration logs, safer worker prompts, harness abstraction, themes, and PR delivery.

harness_metadata.title: Polish dashboard demo
harness_metadata.last_assistant_text: The dashboard now frames the old tmux/multi-terminal agent workflow as a context-switching problem and shows Meringue as the control plane for parallel agents.

harness_metadata.title: Update zsh helper workflow
harness_metadata.last_assistant_text: Updated safe zsh workflow helpers for daily terminal use. Secret-bearing config and private machine details were intentionally left out of the demo receipt.

harness_metadata.title: Add missing dotfiles
harness_metadata.last_assistant_text: Collected missing dotfile pieces and kept local workflow helpers organized for repeatable setup.

logs.message: Loaded resettable Devpost demo state for a full Meringue TUI session.

details.demo_receipt: I used Meringue to build Meringue.

logs.message: Prior worker polished the parallel-agent dashboard demo path.
Registered .config as a preloaded demo project.
Prior config worker completed zsh workflow helper changes.
Ready for live demo prompts: README self-update, theme switch, and another project worker.

details.suggested_first_prompt: Ask Meringue to build its own README and open a PR.

messages.text: Demo state loaded. This resettable snapshot gives the dashboard a real story before the live prompts start: Meringue has already used Meringue to improve itself, and .config shows a second local project. The seeded completed workers are demo receipts; anything you ask next still goes through fresh heads, validated kernel commands, and real worker sessions.
